title: Bubble Bobble
description: 2-player co-op — first pair to clear the most rounds wins. Or competitive: P1 vs P2, highest score after N rounds. 100-level classic with a perfect tournament arc.

p1_lives.notes: AR: 002E:09. Bub (P1) lives. Starts at 3 (or 5/9 depending on start code).

p2_lives.notes: AR: 0042:09. Bob (P2) lives. Offset +0x14 from P1.

round.notes: AR: 0401:00. Current round (0-indexed, 0 = round 1). 100 rounds total.

timer.notes: AR: 040D:32 = infinite time. Normal timer counts down (0x32 = 50 seconds).

p1_invincibility.notes: AR: 003F:2F = invincible. Monitor for 0x2F = active power-up state.

tournament_rules: 2-player co-op race. Both players start simultaneously. First team to clear round 20 wins (or furthest round reached if time limit hit). Alternative: competitive mode — P1 vs P2 score after 10 rounds (track who pops more enemies). Recommend starting on round 1, 5 lives each.
sources: libretro-database/cht NES AR: 002E P1 lives, 0042 P2 lives, 0401 round, 040D timer
